untranslatable_reason: Volume spike definition and magnitude threshold are marked AUTHOR_SILENT. The exact definition of 'volume spike' (e.g., multiple of average volume, absolute threshold) is not specified in source material. Used vol_ratio_20 > 2.0 as a reasonable proxy, but this is an assumption. Direction of reversion (mean reversion vs. trend reversal) cannot be determined without additional context.
translation_notes: Signal indicates volume spike signals directional change (reversion), not trend confirmation. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original specification. Entry triggered by volume spike using vol_ratio_20 as proxy. Exit conditions default to price reversal logic since AUTHOR_SILENT. The fundamental challenge is that 'change of direction' is ambiguous without knowing current trend context.
